summary: Base W7 COMPLETE — prescribed ~19 mpw, ran trimmed. Headline out of the Sat long run: TWO reactive tendons under the ramp. The left Achilles REVERSED its settling trend (clean Mon 6/1 → very minor Fri 6/5 → Sat 6/6 AM-off + dull ache during + AM stiffness now present = tendinopathy pattern, the Adj #34 monitor trigger fired) AND a NEW right patellar-tendon (below-kneecap) signal appeared on some intervals (Adj #63/#64). No sharp pain/swelling/weakness = not an §11.E Accutane hard-stop, but the athlete's own read ('might need to reduce mileage or I'll get injured') is well-founded. Good timing: W8 is already a scheduled −30% deload (~19→~14 mpw). DECISION MADE 6/7–6/8 (Adj #67, resolves Adj #65): mileage reshaped to v4.3 — peak cut 38→28 mpw, easy/recovery + long-run minutes trimmed Base W9+ / Build / Sharpen / taper, ALL quality sessions (Tue T, Fri VO2max, race-pace) preserved; rationale = VDOT ~45–48 already on a sub-20 line at ≤19 mpw (Adj #9), two reactive tendons at W7 (Adj #63/#64), and protecting goal-2 muscle (cutting concurrent-interference + energy drain). Lift schedule/volume unchanged; W12 5K-TT (≤21:30) still the locking gate. Still lean into the W8 deload and hold the W9 step-up until BOTH tendons read AM-clean. HOLDS PERSIST: calf 335 bump (Adj #40) and the owed hill-stride debut (Adj #44) both gate on an AM-clean Achilles — still held. Week recap: Tue↔Wed swap (Hyp A Tue, T-run 3×8 + MHR retest Wed, peak 187 fatigued — zones unchanged, standalone 1500m all-out still owed, Adj #53); Thu easy SKIPPED; Fri↔Sat rearrangement (Hyp B run fresh Fri, the fresh conditions cleared lat→150 #55, chest-supp row 85 #56, cable lat 17.5 #57; preacher 60 / tri 55 holds persist #58/#59; hanging SLR add load #60; calf forgot #61; Fri easy run + clean strides #62); Sat long-run-only ~4.09 mi/~42 min @ 10:19, outdoor Vomero, HR avg 158. Default §2.A Sat double resumes W8. Lift schedule unaffected (running > everything). Accutane tendon risk persists (§11.E) — escalate on sharp pain/swelling/sudden weakness/muscle pain >72h.

days.note: Logged — Z1 easy 35 min @ 10:36/mi, HR 157, cadence 166, treadmill, Vomero Plus; SI + Achilles clean (first non-reactive Achilles read since the flare). First work set only (strides/recovery omitted per athlete). Held under the prescribed 40 (mileage hold). Hill strides HELD — earliest debut now W9 Mon (W8 deload, Adj #44).

days.session: Hypertrophy A (lift, no run) — swapped from Wed
days.note: Logged — Incline BB 145 bump MISSED (145×5/4 RIR 0/0, 140×4 RIR 0 → repeat 145 next Wed, §5 miss #1, Adj #47); DB lat 25→30 clean, no 27.5 DB (Adj #48); preacher 55 hold cleared → bump 60 (Adj #49); cable crunch 65→70 clean → 75 (Adj #51); tri pushdown 55 hold persists, set 3 still failure (Adj #50); rear-delt 125 holding. Soleus wall-sit PERMANENTLY RETIRED (Adj #52).

days.session: Threshold 3×8 min @ T (90 s rec) + MHR retest finisher — run only, swapped from Tue
days.note: Logged — 3×8 @ T at 7:56 / 7:53 / 7:44 per mi (a hair quick of the 8:00 lock; reps 1-2 in band, rep 3 just under), cadence 180/180/179, power 252–257W, work-rep avg HR 171→175→178. RPE 7 / RIR 2 ('could do 2 more pretty easily') → 8:00/mi confirmed legit threshold (Adj #26); ran quick of 8:00 at RPE 7 = soft signal T pace may have room, watch next T. MHR retest: finisher 3 min @ 6:49/mi, 184 spm, 295W drove session peak to 187 = 98% of the 191 rower max, reached fatigued at session end ('could never get to it') = end-of-session fatigue cap (Adj #53). Doesn't exceed 191 so 191 stands and zones unchanged, but a fatigued 187 supports a fresh max >191 (true run MHR likely 195+); clean standalone 1500m all-out on a fresh day still owed (Adj #9). SI/Achilles not reported.

Skipped — break/rest day per athlete call. Recovery slot, no quality lost; trims aerobic volume only. Fits the W7 Achilles-settle / mileage-hold posture (Adj #34/#44). Fri strides + Sat long unchanged.

days.session: Hypertrophy B + Z1 easy 35 min + 6×20s strides (run fresh, no AM long run)
days.note: Logged — Hyp B run fresh, and the Fri easy run + strides were DONE ANYWAY (not chucked). Lat 145→150 clean → bump 155 (#55); chest-supp row 85 SATISFIED, 3×10 no failure under fresh conditions (Adj #36 cleared) → bump 90 (#56); cable lat 17.5 clean → re-attempt 20 (#57); preacher 60 landed on reps but set 3 failure → hold (#58); tri 55 improved but set 3 still failure → hold (#59); hanging SLR RIR 3 across → add load (#60); seated calf SKIPPED (forgot, #61); chest fly 130 holding. Run 35 min @ 10:00/mi (HR avg 168 hot — anchor by pace), strides 6×180/6:00 zero overshoot (Adj #25 nailed, #62). SI okay, Achilles very minor/okay during.

days.session: Long Z1 ~42 min AM (long-run-only — Hyp B pulled to Fri)
days.note: Logged — ~4.09 mi run / ~42 min @ 10:19/mi (skipped a 15:41 walk mile as WU), outdoor Vomero Plus per Adj #34, cadence 173, power 195–204W; HR avg ~158 (splits 153→161) cooler than Fri's 168, anchor by pace (Adj #9). Effectively trimmed to ~42 min (~45 reported) = the Achilles trim. LEFT Achilles REVERSED — AM-off + dull ache during + AM stiffness now present (Adj #34 monitor trigger fired) → calf 335 / hill-stride holds persist (Adj #40/#44/#63). NEW right patellar-tendon (below-cap) signal on some intervals (Adj #64). Not an §11.E hard-stop. Athlete flagged mileage cut (Adj #65) — W8 deload next.

Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1, daily SI prehab. Walking fine. AM tendon recheck — left Achilles (AM stiffness, Adj #63) + right patellar tendon (Adj #64); both reactive. W8 deload starts Mon — and mileage is now reshaped v4.3 (peak 38→28 mpw, quality preserved; Adj #67 resolves the Adj #65 concern). Hold the W9 step-up until both tendons read AM-clean.
